---
title: "Contact"
---

::: {.grid}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-5 .contact-info}

**Hunter Martaindale, Ph.D.**\
Director of Research\
ALERRT Center, Texas State University\
San Marcos, TX

**Email:** [hunter.martaindale\@txstate.edu](mailto:hunter.martaindale@txstate.edu)

**Areas of Expertise**

- Active shooter incident analysis, response protocols, and training program evaluation
- Officer decision making
- Public opinion of police and community-police relations
- Expert witness services in use of force and police practices litigation

I am available for research consulting, expert witness testimony, training consultation, speaking engagements, and media commentary. Use the form to introduce your inquiry, or email directly.

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-7}

::: {.contact-card}

### Send a Message

<form action="https://formspree.io/f/mykbwyyn" method="POST" class="contact-form" novalidate>
  <div class="row g-3">
    <div class="col-md-6">
      <label for="c-name" class="form-label">Name <span class="req">*</span></label>
      <input type="text" class="form-control" id="c-name" name="name" required>
    </div>
    <div class="col-md-6">
      <label for="c-email" class="form-label">Email <span class="req">*</span></label>
      <input type="email" class="form-control" id="c-email" name="email" required>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="mt-3">
    <label for="c-org" class="form-label">Organization</label>
    <input type="text" class="form-control" id="c-org" name="organization" placeholder="Optional">
  </div>

  <div class="mt-3">
    <label for="c-type" class="form-label">Type of Inquiry <span class="req">*</span></label>
    <select class="form-select" id="c-type" name="inquiry_type" required>
      <option value="" disabled selected>Select an inquiry type...</option>
      <option value="consulting">Research Consulting</option>
      <option value="expert-witness">Expert Witness</option>
      <option value="speaking">Speaking Engagement</option>
      <option value="training">Training Consultation</option>
      <option value="media">Media Request</option>
      <option value="other">Other</option>
    </select>
  </div>

  <div class="mt-3">
    <label for="c-message" class="form-label">Message <span class="req">*</span></label>
    <textarea class="form-control" id="c-message" name="message" rows="6" required
      placeholder="Brief description of the project, timeline, and any relevant context."></textarea>
  </div>

  <input type="hidden" name="_subject" value="Website inquiry: huntermartaindale.com">
  <input type="text" name="_gotcha" style="display:none" tabindex="-1" autocomplete="off">

  <div class="d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center mt-4">
    <small class="text-muted">Required fields marked <span class="req">*</span>. Replies typically within 2 business days.</small>
    <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary px-4">Send Inquiry</button>
  </div>
</form>

:::

:::

:::
